metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by tsebavery — industrial automation and workflow tooling

plugins.name: device-recon
plugins.description: Industrial device reconnaissance toolkit. Systematic research, documentation, and reverse-engineering of any Ethernet-connected industrial device.

plugins.name: readiness
plugins.description: Portable Claude Code readiness pipeline. Four-phase audit (preflight → assess → docs → code) with SHA-gated orchestration, fix lists, suppressions, and per-project profiles. Inventories the repo, fetches current best practices live, audits docs and code against versioned rule catalogs, and produces actionable upgrade plans.

plugins.name: switch-recon
plugins.description: Industrial managed-switch reconnaissance toolkit. Read-only preflight (host-NIC/route sanity, L2 discovery, firmware-version check) and gated IP provisioning (PROFINET-DCP Set-IP / DHCP), then a 12-phase pipeline (intake, research, web-UI crawl, scan-discovery, scan-deep, test-plan, test-execute, security-analysis, audit-quality, docs, code, package) for managed Ethernet switches: SNMP v1/v2c/v3 full-MIB walk, SSH/CLI automation, HTTP/HTTPS web-UI + REST crawl, NETCONF/RESTCONF/gNMI, L2 discovery (LLDP/STP/VLAN/LACP/MAC-FDB), and PROFINET DCP + EtherNet/IP CIP identity. Vendor-agnostic; generates Mermaid diagrams, a file://-safe HTML config browser, an MCP server, a CLI, and a Rust crate. Lab/test devices only.

plugins.name: xelity-switch
plugins.description: Spec-driven MCP toolkit for Murrelektronik Xelity / libCWebUI managed industrial switches. Point-and-read capability discovery over the device's own REST catalog, deterministic full-device snapshot + structural diff, PROFINET-DCP (Layer-2) discovery and IP/name addressing, real firmware flashing, and live per-port WebSocket status/statistics — exposed as an MCP server (FastMCP) plus slash commands and skills. Designed to survive firmware updates without code changes; destructive operations (flash/config-write) are bench/lab devices only.
